title: From the caves
body:
A Simple Horror-Modpack that focuses around the [From the Caves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/from-the-caves) mod
#
### **WARNING: PHOTOSENSITIVITY**

This mod contains flashing light effects that may cause discomfort or seizures for individuals with photosensitive epilepsy or similar sensitivities.

You can disable these effects at any time using the command: **`/fromthecaves photosensitiveMode`**

From the Caves introduces a single stalking entity that haunts your underground explorations. It is governed by a four-phase system that unlocks new events and challenges as you delve deeper. It can interact with objects in your world, altering blocks, triggering buttons and levers, building and more. The first time you encounter it, it won’t stay confined to the caves—it starts climbing out, as though you’ve awakened something you never meant to disturb.

It’s unique in many ways, setting it apart from the typical horror mod cave dweller.

#
